ab: adaman marelrang ku kani mulri na vavayan mukuwa i iciba meniwana, i mulri na vavayan miinada da sadu tu sinaleman na kulakulang meniwan, di demeru diya da paakan kana ukiyakesang.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去賣，也製作了原住民美食給客人吃。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: sahar papiya na cau kantu naniwanan, na kamangulr di na lrusi kaduwan na cemacima’, kaduwan na duwa patalrama kanantu tinusiyaw ni mulri na vavayan.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和藤心很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and Cane palm, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: nantu dineru na pinuwayan kana mulingalingaw na kinavelas pukasa kana imaran, ulra diya na tiwngan a vavuy tinusiyaw kana lramumu, tu liwlran pukasa kana pasirep pukuwani da ukiyakesang, kaduwan na daduwa mutulik kananiyam naniwanan.
ch: 她煮的放小莢豆的糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的圓葉胡椒湯，味道非常吸引了客人，很多人都會來我們攤位排隊。
en: The Lima Bean and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: nu demaderu i mulri na vavayan, kadu ku i ngidilan tematuwap kicacevuk ku kana ukiyakesang. tamuni ku marengay da “nahni na kulakulang mau naniyam sinaleman, adi mi pakiwalay pucemel. pakunamun kadika cimima’” kemaku.
ch: 當奶奶在煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我大聲說著：「蔬菜都是我們種的，沒有下任何藥物，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: naniyam emandiya adi repidan piya mi lra meniwan, marengay i mulri na vavayan “amau na ulra inu na pulraalrang” kema kaningku.
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶對我說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: ini na semasahar, kipanadam ku lra datu sinaleman di tu kadalraman da akanen na Yéncumin, di pinatalram ku lra datu ulepan na menaniwan i naniwanan.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: mena’u ku lra kani mulri na vavayan kantu misaharan kana akanen a kinaawac pukasa asavak ku semangalan.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我深深感到特別高興。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
